title: Greetings & First Conversations
description: Practice real-world speaking with 3 role-play scenarios — meeting someone for the first time.

blocks.title: Scene: Gujarati Cultural Event
blocks.context: You are attending a Gujarati cultural festival in your city. You want to meet local people and practice your new Gujarati.
blocks.goal: Greet them, ask their name, say where you are from, and say something nice about Gujarat.
usefulPhrases: તમારું નામ શું છે? (What is your name?)
ગુજરાત ખૂબ સુંદર છે! (Gujarat is very beautiful!)
ખૂબ ખૂશ! (Very pleased to meet you!)

blocks.prompt: You are at a Gujarati cultural event. Greet someone new, ask their name, and say where you are from.
hints: તમારું નામ શું છે? (What's your name?)
મને ગુજરાત ગમે છે (I like Gujarat)

blocks.title: Scene: Asking for Help
blocks.context: You are lost in Ahmedabad and need directions to the nearest market. You only know basic Gujarati.
blocks.goal: Politely get the attention of a local, apologize for the interruption, ask for help, and thank them.
usefulPhrases: બજાર ક્યાં છે? (Where is the market?)

blocks.prompt: You didn't understand something your Gujarati tutor said. Politely ask them to repeat it slowly.
